name: Oysters Philadelphia
recipeInstructions:
1. Poach oysters in their own liquor for 2 minutes.
2. Sprinkle sherry over the oysters.
3. Clean the bottom of the deeper oyster shells and place them on a baking tray covered with rock salt.
4. Saute chopped celery in butter and place 1 teaspoonful in each shell.
5. Place a poached oyster on each bed of celery.
6. Cover each oyster with Bechamel Sauce mixed with a few drops of melted butter.
7. Bake in a hot 400°F oven until golden brown.
8. Serve with dark bread and butter.
